nodes.label: Tomorrowland Logo Option C — Horizon Gate
nodes.description: SVG logo concept titled 'Horizon Gate'. Features a rounded-rectangle icon mark (200x200, warm off-white fill #f8f7f2 with light border) containing a stylised gateway/arch motif rendered with layered vertical and arched strokes. The outer arch uses near-black (#17202a) with a thick 13px stroke; an inner arch uses deep teal (#0b6b5b); a horizontal baseline in near-black anchors the gate. Two horizontal accent lines sit inside the arch: a golden/amber line (#d89a21) at mid-height and a blue line (#2563eb) near the top, suggesting horizon layers or document rows. Below the gate, two muted grey segment lines (#8a969f) evoke metadata or footnote text. The wordmark 'Tomorrowland' is set in Inter at 66px weight 760 in near-black, followed by the tagline 'A quiet entry point into governed knowledge' in 24px medium grey. Three segmented grey lines beneath the tagline reinforce the document/content metaphor. Overall design style: calm, minimal, document-native; brand concept: a governed knowledge gateway or portal.
key_visual_elements: tagline: A quiet entry point into governed knowledge
nodes.brand_concept: Horizon Gate — a calm, governed knowledge entry point
